validation: Exact compact desktop home final validation
target_layout: Owner screenshot: compact white header, one-row search/category/location, circular category shortcuts, Latest Ads four-column grid
root_causes: The restored React bundle still contained the green Hero and was incorrectly treated as the requested desktop build.
The old index-filters desktop code only modified controls inside the green Hero; it never removed the Hero as the desktop source of truth.
React, the old desktop mutation helper, and theme rewriting were allowed to compete during first paint.
A previous independent OLX demo shell used a different visual design and could show zero ads when the compact API query failed.
fixes: Desktop home at 1024px and wider now uses one exact source of truth before first paint.
React green Hero, index-filters desktop mutation code, brand-theme and lazy Supabase SDK are not loaded on desktop home.
Mobile/tablet home and all inner routes continue using the existing React application.
Live ads load from /api/public-home and filters from /api/public-meta.
Search, category shortcuts, location filtering, favourites and database ad detail links are implemented in the exact desktop home.
Old demo desktop files remain build-cleaned and the shared helper has a defensive early-return guard.
